description: Propose a canonical SUVA hazard category code.

fixtures.prompt: Scenario: packaging line changeover with a jammed carton sensor. Propose the best single SUVA hazard category code and a short rationale. Return JSON only.

expectedShape.humanReviewNote: Reviewer checks usefulness, safety-domain fit, and whether the output avoids inventing facts.
